mapper.select: SELECT ughi.user_id AS userId, ughi.github_app_installation_id AS gitHubInstallationId, ir.installation_repository_id AS installationRepositoryId, ir.full_name AS repositoryFullName FROM user_git_hub_installations ughi INNER JOIN github_app_installations gai ON gai.github_app_installations_id = ughi.github_app_installation_id INNER JOIN installation_repository ir ON ir.github_app_installation_id = gai.github_app_installations_id WHERE ughi.user_id = #{userId} AND ir.installation_repository_id = #{installationRepositoryId}

SELECT p.project_id AS projectId, p.tracked_branch AS trackedBranch, pm.project_member_id AS projectMemberId, u.user_id AS userId, u.oauth_provider_id AS oauthProviderId, gi.github_app_installations_id AS matchedInstallationId, gi.account_id AS matchedInstallationAccountId, ir.installation_repository_id AS installationRepositoryId, ir.full_name AS repositoryFullName, ir.is_private AS isPrivate, base_gi.account_login AS installationAccountLogin FROM github_app_installations base_gi INNER JOIN installation_repository ir ON ir.github_app_installation_id = base_gi.github_app_installations_id INNER JOIN projects p ON p.installation_repository_id = ir.installation_repository_id INNER JOIN project_member pm ON pm.project_id = p.project_id INNER JOIN users u ON u.user_id = pm.user_id INNER JOIN user_git_hub_installations ughi ON ughi.user_id = u.user_id INNER JOIN github_app_installations gi ON gi.github_app_installations_id = ughi.github_app_installation_id WHERE base_gi.github_app_installations_id = #{installationId} AND ir.installation_repository_id = #{installationRepositoryId} AND gi.account_id = #{senderAccountId} LIMIT 1
